source.ref: An AdamFX n Martin Infusion 2 flexi - Why The Sky Looks Diffrent Today - AdamFx n Martin Infusion - Tack Tile Disfunction B

display.name: AdamFx + Martin Infusion - Tactile Disfunction
display.author: AdamFX/Martin/Flexi
display.blurb: Abstract structures morph against a shifting palette.

annotation.technical_notes: The preset remains mostly dark and sparse until heavy bass peaks trigger explosive, beat-gated bursts of a glossy, reflective grid of 3D tiles. During these high-energy moments, custom waves rendering electrical lightning arcs react dynamically to treble frequencies. The feedback loop in sampler_main maintains a receding tunnel perspective that collapses back into darkness as the audio decays.
